She has a three cost that gives a giant pile of Aliemus.
She does other things too, but that's the main one.
Why is that good for gmurph thp
GMurphy's dmg is proportionally tied to her exalt
More aliemus = more dmg
Being able to charge Thais means you can duplicate the 3 cost more often
Which also leads to more dmg
